g.text: Browser-based SSH — No public IP needed
Access policy scoped to deploying user
Threat detection & analytics on DNS events
Azure DNS Security Policy Lab — Architecture
1. User connects to VM via Azure Bastion (browser SSH)
2. VM issues DNS queries (e.g. nslookup malicious.contoso.com)
3. DNS Security Policy intercepts & blocks matching domains
4. DnsResponse logs sent to Log Analytics
5. Microsoft Sentinel analyzes logs for threat detection
